name: Contact Form Providers Overview
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Providing a simple, easy to use way for customers to contact you is an essential part of your website. Neto is flexible in that you can use almost any provider that supplies a script or embed code for your website."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Below are some of our recommended services that include great features like captcha, self help articles, templates and dedicated messaging interfaces:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1103-contact-form-providers-overview#zendesk", "children": [{"text": "Zendesk"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1103-contact-form-providers-overview#freshdesk", "children": [{"text": "Freshdesk"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1103-contact-form-providers-overview#wufoo", "children": [{"text": "Wufoo"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1103-contact-form-providers-overview#jotform", "children": [{"text": "JotForm"}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1103-contact-form-providers-overview#host-your-own-contact-form", "children": [{"text": "Host your own Contact Form"}]}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Zendesk"}], "data-id": "zendesk"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Zendesk is a powerful customer support platform to help better engage with shoppers on your website. The Neto Zendesk add-on adds and easy to use contact button to your webstore, so customers can easily contact you."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Learn how to set up Zendesk for your webstore "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Freshdesk"}], "data-id": "freshdesk"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Freshdesk is part of the Freshworks suite of software, empowering sales, support, HR and a host of other business functions. With Freshdesk you can easily add a contact us widget to your webstore to manage customer communications from a dedicated interface."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Learn how to set up Freshdesk in your webstore "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1104-add-a-freshdesk-contact-widget-to-your-webstore", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Wufoo"}], "data-id": "wufoo"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Wufoo is a custom form builder application with an easy to use drag and drop interface. A variety of free plans, and pre-made templates ensure there's a suitable solution for everyone."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With the Wufoo add-on you can integrate a contact form into Neto, by following the steps "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/1009-wufoo-form-builder", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "JotForm"}], "data-id": "jotform"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "JotForm is a free online form builder and creator. With an intuitive drag and drop interface and pre-made templates, you can add a JotFrom contact form to your website in no time."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To learn how to a a JotFrom contact form to your webstore follow the steps "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Host your own Contact Form"}], "data-id": "host-your-own-contact-form"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Neto can host a basic contact form on a page on your webstore. It is a bare bones solution, and doesn't offer features such as captcha or a dedicated interface to manage customer interactions."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To set up your own contact form in Neto, follow the steps "}, {"text": "here"}, {"text": "."}]}]
